about.title: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS — Reliable Passenger Transport Operator in London

about.paragraph1: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS is a transport company that organises passenger travel in London and beyond.
about.paragraph2: We work with private clients, companies and groups.
about.paragraph3: We build every trip as a managed process — from receiving the request to completing the route. This approach ensures a consistent level of service, regardless of the transport format and number of passengers.

privacy.text: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS processes personal data provided in this form exclusively for the purpose of processing your enquiry, arranging transport, and communicating with you. Your data will not be used for marketing purposes without your separate consent and will not be shared with third parties, except where necessary to fulfil the service (e.g. with drivers or carrier partners). You have the right to request access to your data, its correction, or deletion.

1.title: General Information
1.content:
This Privacy Policy describes how LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS processes the personal data of website users.

Company: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS LTD
Jurisdiction: England and Wales
Registration Number: 00000000
Registered Office: 10 Example House, London, United Kingdom

LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS is a data controller within the meaning of UK GDPR.

2.title: What Data We Collect

3.title: Purposes of Data Processing

4.title: Legal Basis for Processing

5.title: Data Transfer to Third Parties
5.content:
We may share data with:
- drivers and transport partners;
- contractors involved in service delivery.

Data is shared exclusively to the extent necessary to provide the service.

6.title: Data Retention
6.content: Personal data is retained no longer than necessary for the purposes of processing or in accordance with legal requirements.

7.title: User Rights

8.title: Data Security
8.content: The company takes reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect personal data.

9.title: Data Enquiries
9.content: For data processing enquiries, you may contact LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS using the contact details provided on the website.

10.title: Policy Changes
10.content: The company reserves the right to amend this Privacy Policy.

1.title: General Information
1.content:
This Cookie Policy explains how LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS uses cookies and similar technologies on the website.

The use of cookies is regulated by:
- UK GDPR;
- Privacy and Electronic Communications Regulations, PECR.

2.title: What Are Cookies
2.content:
Cookies are small text files stored on the user's device when visiting a website. They allow the website to recognise the user's device and remember certain information.

Cookies may be:
- session cookies, deleted when the browser is closed;
- persistent cookies, stored on the device for a defined period.

3.title: What Cookies We Use
3.content:
Strictly necessary cookies are essential for the website to function correctly and do not require user consent. They are used to provide basic functionality, remember user choices, and ensure security.

Analytical cookies are used to analyse user behaviour and improve website performance. These cookies are only used with user consent.

Functional cookies allow the website to remember user preferences, such as language or interface settings. They are only used with consent, unless they are strictly necessary.

4.title: Legal Basis for Using Cookies
4.content: Strictly necessary cookies are used on the basis of legitimate interest. All other cookies are used exclusively on the basis of user consent.

5.title: Obtaining Consent

6.title: Managing Cookies

7.title: Third-Party Cookies
7.content:
We may use third-party services, such as analytics tools, that set cookies on their own behalf.

Such third parties process data in accordance with their own privacy policies.

8.title: Cookie Retention Period

9.title: Policy Changes
9.content: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS reserves the right to update this Policy at any time. The current version is always available on the website.

10.title: Contact Information
10.content: For enquiries related to the use of cookies, you may contact LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS using the contact details provided on the website.

hero.title: Our Services
hero.subtitle: LONDON ROUTE TRANSFERS provides a full range of passenger transport services across London and the UK. We work with private clients, corporate customers, and groups.

keyBenefits.title: Key Benefits
items: Single operator for different transport formats

airport.title: Airport Transfers
airport.subtitle: Reliable transfers to all major London airports with flight monitoring and meet and greet
airport.description: We provide transfers to Heathrow, Gatwick, Stansted, Luton and London City airports. Our drivers monitor flight arrival times, meet passengers in the arrivals hall with a name board, and assist with luggage. Each airport transfer is managed as a controlled process — from booking confirmation to destination arrival.
highlights: Meet and greet at arrivals with name board
Fixed pricing — no surge or hidden fees
Door-to-door service to any London postcode

corporate.title: Corporate Transport
corporate.subtitle: Professional transport solutions for businesses, employees, and clients
corporate.description: We arrange transport for corporate clients — from individual executive transfers to regular scheduled routes for employees. Our fleet includes executive sedans, MPVs, and group vehicles. We handle business events, conferences, client meetings, and daily commute routes with consistent service quality.
highlights: Transport for conferences and business events

group.title: Group Travel
group.subtitle: Minibuses and coaches for school trips, tours, and corporate group travel
group.description: We provide minibuses and full-size coaches for groups of 8 to 72 passengers. Our vehicles are suitable for school excursions, tourist groups, corporate outings, and event transport. We plan routes, manage schedules, and ensure all passengers travel together comfortably.
highlights: Minibuses (8–16 seats) and coaches (up to 72 seats)

private.title: Private Travel
private.subtitle: Bespoke transport for weddings, events, and personal travel across London and beyond
private.description: We provide private hire for celebrations, weddings, city tours, and long-distance journeys. Whether you need transport for a special occasion or a comfortable ride to another UK city, we adapt the vehicle and service to your requirements.

cta.title: Ready to book?
cta.description: Fill in the booking form and we will arrange your transport.
